data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and deep blues with selective orange and teal accents. A dramatic view of a procedurally generated star system: a glowing orange sun at center, multiple planets in orbital paths shown as curved lines, one large gas giant with visible rings, scattered asteroid belt. Stars scattered in deep black background. Cinematic space scene, sense of scale and wonder. No text.
